message:
Remove internal changelog example

Drop the implementation-shaped request payload from the Gemini research changelog entry so it only describes user-visible behavior.

files.patch:
@@ -9,12 +9,4 @@ created: 2026-04-25T08:55:03.570509Z
 
 Gemini-powered `web_research` requests now start reliably with the default pi workflow. Previously, pi could generate Gemini-specific options that made the request fail before research started.
 
-You can start Gemini research without adding provider-specific options:
-
-```json
-{
-  "input": "Research current options for ..."
-}
-```
-
 Collapsed research results also show the correct `ctrl+o to expand` hint when expanded details are available.
